source: gong_maoliang_Page99_104:99, gong_maoliang_Page99_104:100, gong_maoliang_Page99_104:101, gong_maoliang_Page99_104:102, gong_maoliang_Page99_104:103, gong_maoliang_Page99_104:104
title_zh: 内六角圆柱头螺钉 GB/T70.1-2000 M8×18 三工位冷镦成形工艺与标准模具图册
product_category: 内六角圆柱头螺钉 (SHCS), M5–M20, GB/T70.1-2000
why_it_matters: 提供了从M5到M20全系列内六角圆柱头螺钉的冷镦关键尺寸参数表（含模片厚H、合模间隙n、头部dk/da/ds、六角对边S、螺纹小径d1/d2等），以及M8×18三工位典型工艺变形图和切料、1序、2序、3序完整模具组装图（图号Z46-8/3），是该类紧固件冷镦模具设计与工艺规划的重要参考。
visible_process_summary_zh: 三工位（3序）冷镦工艺：0序切料→1序镦头预成形→2序正挤杆部/缩径→3序终成形头部（含六角孔成形，模片角度12°/7°，头部入口角30°）；后道工序为搓丝/滚丝。成形工序图显示头部采用120°对称分模，模片厚H随规格变化（M5:4.3mm～M20:14.0mm），合模间隙(n)可调（M5:0.5mm～M20:5.5mm）。

M8x18_station1_after.head_length: 8.5 mm (uncertain — likely includes pre-form taper that is compressed in later stations; final spec k=8mm)

M8x18_station2_after.head_height_approx: 6.3 mm (uncertain — possibly socket-cavity bottom thickness or an extraction error; final head height per GB/T 70.1 spec is k=8mm)

M8x18_station3_final.head_height: 8.0 mm per GB/T 70.1 spec (kmax=8); draft value 6.5 mm is likely OCR/extraction error and contradicts the size table earlier in this case

station_sequence.geometry_zh: 剪切圆棒料为坯料；切料模组装图号 Z46-8/3-000，切料组件含件001(外套φ35/φ20)和件002(内衬φ38/φ20)，切料长度方向尺寸50mm(外)/22mm，内孔定位直径φ20mm

station_sequence.label_zh: 1序 — 镦头预成形（缩径+头部初成形）
station_sequence.geometry_zh: 将坯料镦粗头部，同时对杆部进行缩径预成形。模具组装图号Z46-8/3-100，含件101~113，整体高度约110mm(模座)，冲头侧φ60mm，外套φ50mm。头部外径从φ7.7镦至φ9.2，杆部形成上下台阶。

station_sequence.label_zh: 2序 — 正挤杆部/头部扩径+六角预冲
station_sequence.geometry_zh: 进一步镦大头部至φ12.76，用100°锥角冲头预冲六角孔，杆部正挤缩径。模具组装图号Z46-8/3-200，含件101~104(共用)及205~211，整体高度约110mm(上)/115mm(下)，φ60mm导柱。

dimensions.head_height_mm: 6.3 (uncertain — possibly cavity-bottom thickness or extraction error; final spec k=8mm)

station_sequence.label_zh: 3序 — 终成形（头部精整+六角孔精冲）
station_sequence.geometry_zh: 终成形头部至最终尺寸φ13mm、高约8mm（GB/T70.1 M8 spec kmax=8；草稿数据 6.5 与 size table kmax 矛盾，已改用 spec 值）；30°入口角精冲六角孔至深4mm、对边S=6mm；杆部终缩径至φ7.08(搓丝前)。模具组装图号Z46-8/3-300。

dimensions.head_height_mm: 8.0 per GB/T 70.1 kmax (uncertain — draft 6.5 contradicts size table)

station_sequence.geometry_zh: 使用d1尺寸杆部进行搓丝或滚丝，得到最终螺纹M8×1.25（6g）。M8对应d1=7.10mm，d2(螺纹小径)=6.4mm。

usage_in_prompt: Use this case for: (1) M5–M20 SHCS GB/T70.1-2000 cold-heading dimension lookup (dk, ds, S, k, t, w, ls, lg, d1, d2); (2) 3-station cold-heading process planning for M8 SHCS including blank size, station geometry progression, and hex-punch angles; (3) modular die assembly numbering convention (Z46-8/3 series: -000 cut-off, -100 station-1, -200 station-2, -300 station-3); (4) die plate thickness H and parting-gap n values as function of bolt size. Note: several final-station tolerances and some assembly part labels are uncertain due to scan quality.
